projectDescription: Cassie is an X-native AI trading agent that reads market-flavored tweets, finds the best expression across Hyperliquid and Polymarket, and executes trades from your wallet when you mention @cassiedottrade.
keyFeatures: Tweet-to-trade: mention @cassiedottrade under any market post to trigger an AI-driven trade
Multi-venue execution across Hyperliquid (perps & spot) and Polymarket (prediction markets)
AI supervisor pipeline: opportunity framing, trade-expression generation, venue search, risk check, and ticket creation
Non-custodial Privy wallet — funds stay in your wallet, Cassie only has trading permission
Default trade size setting — deploy a fixed USDC amount per mention
Telegram notifications — real-time alerts when a trade fills, a watch moves, or a counter triggers
Position tracking with live marks and daily P&L review
Trade share cards — auto-generated prestige OG cards posted to X when a call resolves
Full audit trail of every run, step, ticket, and execution event
Dashboard for monitoring open positions, watching signals, and reviewing activity
publicApiSurface: GET /api/account — fetch authenticated user account and wallet state
GET /api/dashboard — fetch dashboard payload (positions, activity, account)
POST /api/x/webhook — X Account Activity webhook receiver (CRC + signature verification)
